title: malcolmia orsiniana subsp. angulifolia
intro: Malcolmia orsiniana subsp. angulifolia, also known as the Italian Cress or Orsinian Cress, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small white flowers and angular leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Malcolmia orsiniana subsp. angulifolia is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be added to salads or used as a cooking green.
